features: LUXURY FRAGRANCE: Since 1975, Milton-Lloyd have earned an unshakeable reputation for luxury perfumes without the expense. This rich and sensual premium ladies perfume is the scent for the elegant woman

ELEGANT, RICH AND SENSUAL: sparkling citrus, neroli and raspberry top fragrance notes embrace a rich floral heart of white jasmine, on a warm, tenacious base of honey, patchouli wood and musk in this perfume for women

LONG LASTING LADIES PERFUME: Colour Me Gold Femme womens perfume comes with a 6 hour minimum guarantee. It is the luxury oils, blended at high concentrations that promises outstanding quality and long-lasting performance
THE COLOUR ME COLLECTION: A trending collection of luxury womens fragrances by Milton-Lloyd

MILTON-LLOYD PRODUCT: Milton-Lloyd works with the world’s leading perfumers, using the finest oils, blended at high concentrations to create sophisticated, long lasting, luxury fragrances. Every year, millions of people fall in love with our fragrances
description: Product Description Milton-Lloyd is a leading name in the world of fragrances, providing exquisite perfume for women and mens perfumes and mens aftershave, all at affordable prices. Based in London, Milton-Lloyd is a family-owned business with over 45 years of experience creating luxury fragrance for women and fragrance for men. We believe that perfume oil is the key ingredient that makes the difference between an average ladies perfume or eau de parfum for men and an exceptional one. Therefore, we prioritise perfume oil over branding, advertising, and packaging, and we work with the world's leading perfumers to blend the finest perfume oils at high concentrations to create luxury womens perfumes, girls perfume, body mist for women, perfume sets, mens fragrances and parfum men feel great wearing, without the luxury price tag. At Milton-Lloyd, we believe that luxury is inclusive, and our range of Colour Me perfume men and women can both enjoy caters for every taste. It offers a variety of scents for different moods and occasions. For women perfume should excite, and our Colour Me womans perfumes includes options ranging from fresh and floral to energetic and fiery. Our Colour Me men perfumes and men aftershaves are equally diverse, ranging from spicy and aromatic to rich and woody. Colour Me packaging is sleek and modern, making it a great addition to any fragrance collection or a perfect gift for someone special. From 50ml mini perfumes for women to womens body sprays and body mists for those who prefer a lighter fragrance, our Colour Me range promises something for any modern woman. Our Colour Me perfume men’s range also offers a variety of fragrances that are affordable and long-lasting. At Milton-Lloyd, we make aftershave men love and parfum women can’t wait to wear. We don't believe in throwing money into marketing our brands, but we do believe in delivering fragrances that speak for themselves. Try our products today, and you'll never go back to expensive luxury brands. Ingredients SD Alcohol 40B Propellant (Butane Cap 40) Parfum (Fragrance) Directions Apply to pulse points such as wrists, neck and behind ears. 2-3 sprays are recommended for an eau de parfum Reapply every 4-6 hours for extended wearing time. Safety Warning For external use only.Avoid direct contact with eyes. In case of eye contact, rinse immediately with water. Cosmetic use only. Store below 30 degrees Celsius. Box Contains 1 x Colour Me Femme Gold 100ml EDP See more
